arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Manchester United LIVE: Latest updates as snow threatens Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Inclement weather has put the league leaders’ clash with their struggling rivals in doubt

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United latest as midday meeting planned over Anfield game's fate
arts.sum: A meeting at noon is planned to see if Liverpool's visit from Manchester United at Anfield can go ahead

arts.ttl: Manchester United line up Real Madrid midfielder as Casemiro replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United have lined up Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni as a potential long-term replacement for Casemiro. Casemiro is free to leave Manchester United as the Red Devils look to offload the 32-year-old this month. arts.ttl: Second Liverpool vs Manchester United safety meeting scheduled amid weather concerns
arts.sum: Man United are scheduled to go to Liverpool this afternoon but a second meeting will be held to determine if the game will go ahead.

arts.ttl: Liverpool issue official statement on Man Utd match postponement
arts.sum: Liverpool have issued a statement regarding the Premier League match against Manchester United on Sunday afternoon after a safety meeting was held

arts.ttl: Liverpool - Man Utd in doubt due to heavy snow
arts.sum: Liverpool's Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday is at risk of being postponed due to heavy snow in the north of England.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd kick-off decision delayed as severe snow forces emergency meeting
arts.sum: Liverpool vs Manchester United is scheduled to kick off at 4.30pm on Sunday afternoon, but the Premier League game is under threat of postponement following heavy snow

arts.ttl: UK snow causes sporting chaos as emergency meeting held over Liverpool vs Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Liverpool's Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday afternoon is under threat of postponement after heavy snow fell overnight, while some fixtures have already fallen victim to the weather

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told harsh reality of Man Utd transfer situation in tough statement
arts.sum: As Ruben Amorim continues to struggle at Manchester United, the Portuguese boss has been told to not expect any real reinforcements in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool to rival Real Madrid for star who is ‘second-best’ in the world in his role
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool have been mentioned as clubs keen on signing Martin Zubimendi. The 25-year-old Spanish international was heavily linked with a move to Liverpool at the start of the season but he ended up staying at Real Sociedad.
